choices.text: Very complex tasks needing many specialists (>10 agents). Top supervisor → sub-supervisors → specialists. Each level decides among 3-5 options vs. one supervisor decides among 20 options (error-prone). Sub-teams as compiled graphs treated as nodes in parent.

questions.prompt: Single supervisor with 25 specialist agents performs poorly. Fix?

choices.text: Hierarchical structure. Top supervisor routes to 5 team supervisors; each team supervisor has 5 specialists. Decision space at each level: 5 options instead of 25. Cleaner reasoning; less context bloat; better specialist selection. Compose sub-teams as sub-graphs; LangGraph supports natively.

questions.explanation: Restructure as hierarchy: top → team supervisors → specialists. 5-way decisions vs. 25-way.
